programme.title: Oração Diabólica, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Quatro viajantes são perseguidos pela maligna irmã Monday, uma lendária freira que matou diversas pessoas quando viva. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Damian Maffei, Erika Edwards, Felissa Rose, Gunner Willis, Kristi Ray, Michael James Daly, Sean Krumbholz. Diretor: Tommy Faircloth

programme.title: A Ilha dos Tubarões, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Um grupo de completos estranhos se vê isolado por um louco rico em seu complexo na ilha. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Patrick Bergin, Yancy Butler, Josh Allen Diretor: Christopher Douglas-Olen Ray

programme.title: Crônicas da Tribo Fantasma, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Quando fósseis gigantes são descobertos perto da Mongólia, uma expedição é organizada para analisá-los. Quando uma explosão deixa os membros da equipe de escavação enterrados no subsolo, eles descobrem um templo ciclópico e bestas gigantes antigas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Congo, (1995)
programme.desc: 1995. Quando uma expedição desaparece no Congo, um grupo é enviado para procura-la, em uma aventura cheia de acontecimentos, tecnologia e muito suspense. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Laura Linney, Dylan Walsh, Ernie Hudson Diretor: Frank Marshall

programme.title: D Artagnan O Quarto Mosqueteiro, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. A mando de seu pai, o jovem d’Artagnan viaja da Gasconha rural para Paris, onde se envolve em uma trama desonesta entre os mosqueteiros do rei e os guardas do cardeal Richelieu. Gêneros: Children & Family Elenco: Jonathan Hansler, Matt Ingram-Jones, Morgan Rees-Davies, Ade Dimberline, Richard Ingle, Mollie Hindle, Melvyn Rawlinson, Nathan McGowran, Sean Cronin... Diretor: Steven Lawson

programme.title: Império Proibido, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. No início do século 18, o cartógrafo Jonathan Green empreende uma viagem científica da Europa para o Oriente. Passando pela Transilvânia e cruzando as montanhas dos Cárpatos, ele encontra uma pequena vila perdida na floresta. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Flemyng, Aleksey Chadov, Agniya Ditkovskite Diretor: Oleg Stepchenko

programme.title: O Fantasma, (1996)
programme.desc: 1996. A história começa como uma expedição à ilha de Bengalla, buscando as Caveiras de Touganda. Devido à sua enorme energia, elas podem ser desastrosas para a raça humana. Agora, o mal encontrou rival à altura e a aventura ganhou um nome: Fantasma! Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Billy Zane, Kristy Swanson, Treat Williams, Catherine Zeta-Jones, James Remar, Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa Diretor: Simon Wincer, Kevin Gorman

programme.title: Batalha dos Impérios, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. O general romano Lucius lidera uma legião de mil soldados no país e com o comandante do protetorado das Regiões Ocidentais, Huo An, ele luta para derrotar o assassino Tiberius e restaurar a soberania da China. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jackie Chan, John Cusack, Adrien Brody Diretor: Daniel Lee

programme.title: Deus da guerra, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Na dinastia Ming, onde o jovem general Qi Jiguang conquista uma importante vitória contra os piratas japoneses, comandando o exército chinês. Quando, quatro anos depois, sua nação é mais uma vez atacada, Qi se vê obrigado a retornar aos campos de batalha. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Wenzhuo Zhao, Sammo Kam-Bo Hung, Regina Wan, Yasuaki Kurata, Keisuke Koide, Xiajie Cai, Naohide Funaki, Wei Hu, Timmy Hung, Luxia Jiang Diretor: Gordon Chan

programme.title: Missao Quase Impossível, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Ex-C.I.A. espião Bob Ho assume sua tarefa mais difícil até hoje: cuidar dos três filhos de sua namorada, que não gostaram muito do namorado de sua mãe. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jackie Chan, George Lopez, Lucas Till, Amber Valletta Diretor: Brian Levant

programme.title: A Viagem, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Uma exploração de como as ações de vidas individuais impactam umas às outras no passado, presente e futuro, como uma alma vai de assassino a herói, e um ato de bondade se espalha ao longo dos séculos para inspirar uma revolução. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Tom Hanks, Halle Berry, Susan Sarandon, Hugh Grant Diretor: Tom Tywe, Lana Wachowski

programme.title: A Menina e o Leão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mia é uma jovem de 14 anos que sempre teve uma profunda amizade com Charlie, um leão branco da fazenda de sua família. Um dia, seu pai decide vender o felino para caçadores de troféus e ela não vê outra opção além de fugir com Charlie para salvá-lo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Rumo ao Fim do Mundo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em meio a uma catástrofe biológica que ameaça destruir a humanidade, as histórias de três casais se cruzam quando eles são forçados a tomar decisões difíceis que definirão seu futuro. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Deixados para Trás III - Mundo em Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No mundo profetizado do Livro da Revelação, o mundo está em paz. Porém, uma tentativa frustrada de assassinato contra o presidente norte-americano aponta para uma conspiração que pretende fazer com que a 3ª Guerra Mundial aconteça o quanto antes. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Lutador de Auschwitz, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um olhar sobre a vida do campeão de boxe Tadeusz Teddy Pietrzykowski, que em 1940 chega ao primeiro transporte de prisioneiros ao recém-criado campo de concentração de Auschwitz. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amante da Rainha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jovem rainha casada com rei insano começa a ter um caso extraconjugal com o médico da corte. Unidos, eles veem que compartilham as mesmas ideias a respeito do futuro de seu país e iniciam uma revolução. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Life - Um Retrato de James Dean, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1955, o fotógrafo Dennis Stock acompanha James Dean em uma viagem para a fazenda da família do ator. No local, Stock registra as imagens mais famosas de toda a carreira de Dean. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Dia da Invasão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Baseado em fatos, na madrugada de 9 de abril de 1940, o exército dinamarquês é colocado em alerta máximo. Os alemães cruzam a fronteira e a Dinamarca está em guerra contra o exército mais forte da Europa. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Vale dos Deuses, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A abundância contrasta com a pobreza em três narrativas separadas, apresentando um escritor de classe média, um trilionário excêntrico e uma comunidade Navajo em dificuldades. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: No Rastro da Violência, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Fascinada pelas raízes do comportamento violento na sociedade atual, a Dra. Amanda Tyler, psiquiatra internacionalmente conhecida, entrevista e analisa o preso Jack Shea, que está no corredor da morte, para autorizar ou não a suspensão da execução. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Diante de um casal de noivos que prometem amor ao se casar, Brela começa seu discurso anti-homens. Ela diz à irmã Matilda que o amor não existe e começa a dar exemplos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Matilda e Rodrigo ficam em choque ao se verem frente a frente no banheiro. Eles começam a conversar, até que um homem entra e Rodrigo o expulsa. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Matilda e Rodrigo saem juntos da exposição e ele se oferece para levá-la em casa. Matilda mente sobre o endereço e o leva até um prédio luxuoso, pois não quer que ele saiba onde ela realmente mora. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Aidé repreende Rodrigo por esquecer Felicia e diz para ele visitá-la, já que ela está convalescente. Ele vai até lá e Felicia faz uma cena de ciúmes por causa da foto dele com Matilda. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Na cafeteria onde Matilda trabalha, Rodrigo mostra a Santiago a foto que tiraram dele com Matilda na noite anterior, dizendo que ela é sua namorada e muito bonita. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Matilda sai para passear com a irmã Brela na região dos prédios luxuosos onde esteve com Rodrigo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Runtime, (2026)
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ruslan, um artista sonha em se tornar um cavaleiro, se apaixona por Mila. A felicidade deles não dura muito tempo. Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Onde Fica o Paraíso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante a II Guerra Mundial, uma pesquisadora durona e solitária abriga um menino fugindo dos bombardeios em Londres. Aos poucos, ela acaba por abrir seu coração em uma emocionante jornada de amizade e imaginação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Garoto-Formiga 3, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O Garoto-Formiga entra em sua adolescência e pensa em se aposentar, mas muda de ideia quando seu arqui-inimigo é libertado da prisão. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma História Americana, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A violência do preconceito racial causa um boicote aos transportes por parte da comunidade negra nos anos 1950. Uma aristocrata decide, por conveniência, ajudar sua empregada, mas seu marido a proíbe. Essa imposição faz com que as duas se unam. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Homem de Família, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um corretor de investimentos, a quem foi oferecida a oportunidade de ver como seria sua vida paralela, acorda e descobre que seu carro esportivo e a namorada se tornaram uma minivan e sua esposa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: North Hollywood, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Acabando a escola, um jovem precisa decidir entre o sonho de tornar-se skatista profissional ou ir para faculdade como seu pai deseja. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Reencontro Inesperado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um marido solitário tenta recapturar seus dias de glória no ensino médio dando uma festa de aniversário surpresa com tema dos anos 80 para sua ocupada esposa. Porém, nessa mesma noite, ela tem que fechar o maior negócio de sua vida. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Força Maior, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante as férias nos Alpes Suíços, uma família é surpreendida por uma avalanche de neve que se aproxima. Desesperado, o pai, Tomás, age impulsivamente e coloca em risco a segurança do seu casamento e também o relacionamento com seus filhos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Recompensa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após passar 12 anos na prisão, o famoso arrombador de cofres Dom Hemingway volta para as ruas de Londres em busca da sua recompensa por ter ficado de boca fechada durante todo esse tempo. Ao lado do amigo Dickie, ele faz uma visita ao chefe do crime. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Dono da Festa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Van Wilder ficou famoso na cidade por organizar as melhores festas da faculdade. Porém, o veterano é forçado a mudar sua rotina de sete anos após perder a mesada do pai, deixando as festividades com os dias contados. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Milagre, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1961, um professor em uma aldeia remota inspira os aldeões a deixarem de lado suas disputas e unirem forças para construir uma escola para as próximas gerações. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Radicão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Tommy vem de uma família de skatistas, mas nunca conseguiu aprender a se equilibrar nas rodas. Quando um valentão da cidade o desafia para uma competição, a única esperança do adolescente é obter ajuda de seu cachorro skatista. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Jogo da Sobrevivência, (2014)

programme.desc: 2019. A tripulação de uma traineira do oeste da Irlanda, abandonada no mar, luta por suas vidas contra um parasita crescente em seu abastecimento de água. programme.title: Crimes Obscuros, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. O policial Tadek investiga um caso de assassinato não resolvido e encontra semelhanças do crime em um livro do artista polonês Krystov Kozlow. Ele começa a investigar a vida do escritor e da sua namorada, uma mulher misteriosa que trabalha num sex club. programme.title: Uma Aventura Selvagem, (2021)

Mas à medida em que continuam sua aventura, eles começam a perceber que existe algo muito mais sinistro por trás desses ataques. programme.title: 2001. Scott Tenorman é um rapaz do oitavo ano que engana Cartman ao vender seus pentelhos. Agora, ele fará o que for preciso para recuperar o seu dinheiro. programme.title: 2001. Os rapazes conhecem um novo rapaz deficiente chamado Jimmy no clube de exploradores, e Timmy fica com ciúmes. programme.title: 2001. Os rapazes conseguem entradas para ir assistir ao show de Terrance e Philip ao vivo, mas o programa cai no mesmo dia que o festival da "Lavagem Cerebral" pelo Dia da Terra. programme.title: 2001. programme.title: 2001. Um dos rapazes mais velhos ensinam para o Cartman como masturbar um cachorro. programme.desc: South Park - T05E07

programme.title: 2001. Para conseguir recuperar um videogame, os rapazes devem entregar uma toalha falante e entregá-la ao serviço secreto americano. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T05E08

programme.title: 2001. Cada estudante de South Park deve doar um dólar para ajudar os meninos do Afeganistão. programme.title: 2001. No dia da foto da escola, Kenny, fazendo graça, entra no seu moletom de cabeça pra baixo, deixando no lugar de sua cabeça, sua bunda. programme.sub-title: Como comer com a sua bunda

programme.title: 2001. O primo do Kyle, que também se chama Kyle, veio de Connecticut para visitar sua mãe em South Park. Porém, apesar da mesma idade, os primos não tem nada em comum. programme.desc: South Park - T05E11

programme.title: 2001. Token está triste pois os demais meninos da escola tiram sarro que sua família é rica e não tem nada a ver com South Park. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker

programme.title: 2002. A turma visita uma granja onde os meninos ficam sabendo que "vitela" é uma vaquinha bebê e ficam horrorizados. programme.desc: South Park - T06E06

programme.title: 2002. Cartman se entusiasma com umas criaturas marinhas que pode criar em seu próprio quarto. programme.title: 2002. Um caso de abusos sexuais envolvendo sacerdotes é o mais novo escândalo para os habitantes de South Park. programme.title: 2002. programme.title: 1997. Kenny é esmagado pela Estação Espacial Mir e se transforma em um zumbi que dá início a uma enorme epidemia. programme.title: 1997. Os rapazes encontram um objeto misterioso em uma escavação escolar e saem no jornal. programme.title: 1998. Uma onda de crimes toma conta de South Park, galinhas são molestadas e Barbrady pede demissão. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. programme.title: 2005. Kenny consegue o último videogame portátil da cidade. programme.title: Street Fighter V - Victory - T01E16

programme.title: Street Fighter V - Victory - T01E17
programme.desc: 1995. Chun-Li percebe que ela e Ken estão sendo enganados por Bison. Ela faz de tudo para detê-lo, mas seus ataques não parecem surtir efeito. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Death Note - T01E32
programme.desc: 2008. A estrela locutora de notícias Kiyomi Takada se torna a porta-voz mundial de Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.title: Death Note - T01E33
programme.desc: 2008. Light tem como objetivo investigar Kiyomi, enquanto os integrantes do corpo especial escutam pelo auto-falante. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E51
programme.desc: 2018. A Equipe 7 recebe a missão de capturar uma gangue de ladrões que vem atacando o Trem Trovão e cujo esconderijo fica em uma cidade na fronteira do País do Fogo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E52
programme.desc: 2018. A Equipe 7 entra na mina em que os ladrões estavam se escondendo e é atacada por um estranho, porém poderoso Zetsu Branco. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations - T01E53
programme.desc: 2018. A Prova Chunin está bem próximo e todos estão animados, exceto por Boruto, que deixa todo mundo para baixo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.title: Naruto: O Demônio Na Neve - T01E19
programme.desc: 2020. Pensando em Haku, Naruto confronta Zabuza com raiva. Sem demonstrar emoções, Zabuza se sente arrasado pela perda de Haku, a única pessoa em quem confiava no mundo. Naruto aprende que esse tipo de realidade cruel é, de fato, o destino de um ninja. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: A Prova Chunin - T01E20
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe voltam à Aldeia Oculta da Folha depois da batalha do País das Ondas. Mesmo concluindo novas missões, Naruto está insatisfeito com a rotina diária, mas logo ele descobre que estrangeiros estão se juntando na Aldeia da Folha. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Identifique-Se : Novos E Poderosos Rivais - T01E21
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura são escolhidos para fazer a Prova Chunin. Iruka se opõe à participação dos três, pois os considera muito novos e inexperientes para o desafio. Kakashi, porém, acredita que eles cresceram e estão mais prontos do que nunca. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Lagrimas Do Jinchuriki - T01E09
programme.desc: 2007. Uma mensagem urgente da aldeia da areia informando o sequestro do kazekage pelos akatsuki chega à aldeia da folha. Tsunade não perde tempo em mandar a equipe kakashi para a aldeia da areia. Enquanto isso, kankuro começa a sua batalha contra os akatsuki. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Jutsu De Selamento: Nove Dragões Fantasmas! - T01E10
programme.sub-title: Jutsu De Selamento: Nove Dragões Fantasmas!
programme.desc: 2007. Os ninjas da areia lutam contra o tempo para salvar kankuro,até queumaperitaem veneno da areia, vovó chiyo é chamada.a única esperança está nos reforços enviados por tsunade. Mas naruto, sakura e kakashi são atrasados por uma tempestade de areia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Aprendiz De Médica Ninja - T01E11

programme.title: Naruto: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke - T01E22
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke
programme.desc: 2020. Enquanto Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se preparam para a prova, um ninja chamado Rock Lee aparece. Lee quer lutar contra Sasuke, que possui o poder do clã Uchiha. Sasuke aceita o desafio de Lee, mas fica só na defesa devido aos ataques rápidos desse oponente. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam - T01E23
programme.sub-title: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se inscrevem oficialmente para a Prova Chunin e formam um time. Para passar, nenhum membro pode falhar. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Liguem Os Motores A Prova Chunin Começa - T01E24
programme.sub-title: Liguem Os Motores A Prova Chunin Começa
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe iniciam a primeira prova. O examinador é Ibiki Morino, um jonin (ninja de alto nível) notório e perito em interrogração. Sasuke e Sakura estão preocupados, pois se Naruto responder tudo errado, eles também falharão. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: A Décima Pergunta Ou Tudo Ou Nada - T01E25
programme.sub-title: A Décima Pergunta Ou Tudo Ou Nada
programme.desc: 2020. A parte mais difícil da prova começa na pergunta 10. Antes dos ninjas escutarem a pergunta, Ibiki coloca uma regra injusta para o problema: quem responder errado será reprovado e não terá o direito de fazer qualquer Prova Chunin no futuro. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Determinação Da Vovó Aposentada - T01E12
programme.desc: 2007. Pakkun acha o esconderijo dos akatsuki. A equipe kakashi e temari se preparam para resgatar, mas temari recebe ordens para ficar e ajudar a proteger a aldeia. Vovó chiyo se oferece para tomar o lugar de temari. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Encontro Com Destino - T01E13
programme.desc: 2007. A equipe kakashi encontra itachi uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Kakashi diz a todos para não olharem nos olhos sharingan de itachi. Kakashi se prepara para enfrentar itachi sozinho e pede que naruto dê cobertura. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Crescimento De Naruto - T01E14

programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy fazem uma pausa. Quando a perseguição recomeça, Kakashi explica a Chiyo que Naruto também é um jinchuriki. Chiyo lamenta ter sido ela que selou o shukaku dentro de Gaara... Gaara é engolfado por uma luz branca. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Infiltração: O Covil Da Cobra! - T01E47
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy chegam ao esconderijo dos akatsuki, mas são parados por uma barreira de cinco selos. Neji usa seu byakugan para localizar os selos e os ninjas destroem a barreira. Naruto tem uma visão chocante. A equipe Guy encara uma armadilha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Laços - T01E48
programme.desc: 2008. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e a equipe Guy enfrenta cópias idênticas de si mesmos. Deidara e Sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki. Forçado a seguir Naruto, Kakashi pede que vovó Chiyo e Sakura não façam nada precipitado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reencontro - T01E51

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with a powerful faction of Transformers known as the Maximals to save Earth. Starring Anthony Ramos, Dominique Fishback, Peter Cullen.

programme.title: RuPauls Drag Race
programme.desc: RuPaul throws a spectacular curveball at the queens with the third design challenge of the season; legendary supermodel Iman guest judges.

programme.title: Project Runway Canada
programme.desc: In a high-stakes pairs challenge, the designers create bold looks using only Cashmere bathroom tissue, with one designer from each duo safe.

programme.title: Queer
programme.desc: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love. Starring Daniel Craig, Drew Starkey, Lesley Manville.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: A man moves into a new home that has supernatural forces lurking in the shadows. As dark entities start to threaten him, his brave dog comes to the rescue. Starring Larry Fessenden, Shane Jensen, Arielle Friedman.

programme.title: Born Hungry
programme.desc: Following the story of a runaway child from the streets of India who is adopted by a family and becomes one of the top chefs in the world.

programme.title: Seven Veils
programme.desc: An earnest theater director is given the task of producing her former mentors most famous work, the opera "Salome," but disturbing memories from her past color her present. Starring Amanda Seyfried, Rebecca Liddiard, Douglas Smith.

programme.title: Riddled With Deceit: A Marthas Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former Detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friends missing emerald brooch, a thief and a murderer. Starring Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind, Eric Keenleyside.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Real Murders
programme.desc: Master sleuth Aurora Teagarden (Candace Cameron Bure) must find a copycat killer who targets members of a crime-buff club. Starring Candace Cameron Bure, Lexa Doig, Robin Dunne.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: The Julius House
programme.desc: Aurora Teagarden finds her dream home, unaware of its strange history. Just as shes ready to move in, she discovers that its previous owners disappeared without a trace. Starring Candace Cameron Bure, Stephanie Bennett, Peter Benson.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: After moving to New York City, kung fu prodigy Li Fong enters a karate competition -- but his skills alone arent enough. With help from Mr. Han and Daniel LaRusso, he soon learns to merge two styles into one for the ultimate martial arts showdown. Starring Jackie Chan, Ralph Macchio, Ben Wang.

programme.title: A Haunting in Venice
programme.desc: Now retired and living in self-imposed exile in the worlds most glamorous city, Poirot reluctantly attends a seance at a decaying, haunted palazzo. He soon gets thrust into a sinister world of shadows and secrets when one of the guests is murdered. Starring Kenneth Branagh, Tina Fey, Camille Cottin.

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher. Starring Kevin Zegers, Dale Midkiff, Caitlin Wachs.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Dolphin Bay
programme.desc: A group of friends are spending the summer working as interns at a research center, which is researching unnatural changes in the local reef. After strange events begin to occur, the friends suspect a local legend may be tied to the reefs problems. Starring Izabela Rose, Jayden McGinlay, Ella Proberts.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures Talking Heads and an ecstatic ensemble of musicians at their exhilarating best in this iconic live performance.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: When humanity allies with a bounty hunter in pursuit of Optimus Prime, the Autobots turn to a mechanic and his family for help. Starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci, Li Bingbing.

programme.title: Blink Twice
programme.desc: When tech billionaire Slater King meets Frida, he invites her to join him and his friends for a dream vacation on his private island. However, when strange things start to happen, shell have to uncover the truth if she hopes to make it out alive. Starring Naomi Ackie, Channing Tatum, Christian Slater.

programme.title: I Dont Understand You
programme.desc: Dom and Cole set out on the perfect Italian getaway. But after getting lost on the way to dinner, they end up stranded in a storm, offend the locals and-whoops-accidentally kill a beloved restaurant owner. Starring Andrew Rannells, Nick Kroll, Amanda Seyfried.

programme.title: A Real Pain
programme.desc: Mismatched cousins David and Benji tour Poland to honor their grandmother. Their adventure becomes complicated as old tensions resurface while exploring their family history. Starring Jesse Eisenberg, Kieran Culkin, Will Sharpe.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father, four children face cruel treatment from their ruthless grandmother (Ellen Burstyn). Starring Heather Graham, Ellen Burstyn, Kiernan Shipka.

programme.title: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owners son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence. Starring Karen Cliche, Samantha Walkes, Morgan Kelly.

programme.title: Metal Tornado
programme.desc: A research teams experiments with solar energy accidentally create massive magnetic vortexes that destroy everything in their path. Starring Greg Evigan, Lou Diamond Phillips, Nicole de Boer.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible. Starring Zachary Levi, Zooey Deschanel, Lil Rel Howery.

programme.title: Brian and Charles
programme.desc: Brian is a lonely and unlucky inventor who takes on his most ambitious project yet -- an artificial intelligence robot made from odds and ends, including an old washing machine. Starring David Earl, Chris Hayward, Louise Brealey.

programme.title: Gunda
programme.desc: Filmmaker Victor Kossakovsky captures natural images of cows, chickens, and a pig and its litter.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: When Ms (Judi Dench) past comes back to haunt her, James Bond (Daniel Craig) must track down and destroy the threat to her and MI6, no matter how personal the cost. Starring Daniel Craig, Judi Dench, Javier Bardem.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Reclusive author Loretta Sage goes on tour to promote her new adventure novel with handsome cover model Alan. When Loretta gets kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire whos looking for a lost treasure, Alan tries to become a real hero and rescue her. Starring Sandra Bullock, Channing Tatum, Daniel Radcliffe.

programme.title: GoldenEye
programme.desc: A secret weapons theft sends Agent 007 to Russia, where a pretty computer programmer helps him track an ex-cohort believed dead. Starring Pierce Brosnan, Sean Bean, Izabella Scorupco.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) and female agent Wai Lin (Michelle Yeoh) pursue a megalomaniacal tycoon (Jonathan Pryce) trying to start World War III. Starring Pierce Brosnan, Jonathan Pryce, Michelle Yeoh.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A new student gets welcomed into the top of the social food chain by an elite group of popular girls called the Plastics. However, when she makes the misstep of falling for the queen bees ex-boyfriend, she finds herself caught in their crosshairs. Starring Angourie Rice, Renee Rapp, Aulii Cravalho.

programme.title: Kiss of the Spider Woman
programme.desc: A political prisoner named Valentín shares a cell with a man named Molina. They form an unlikely bond as Molina recounts a Hollywood musical plot. Starring Diego Luna, Tonatiuh Elizarraraz, Jennifer Lopez.

programme.title: The Amateur
programme.desc: Charlie Heller is a brilliant CIA decoder whose world comes crashing down when his wife dies in a London terrorist attack. When his supervisors refuse to take action, he embarks on a dangerous trek across the globe to track down those responsible. Starring Rami Malek, Rachel Brosnahan, Laurence Fishburne.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: The 70s brought new sounds and icons like Nancy Wilson of Heart and Joan Jett and hard rockers like Wilson and Debbie Harry.

programme.title: Endless Cookie
programme.desc: Two half-brothers, one Indigenous and one white, embark on a journey through time and place. They travel from their remote home in Shamattawa to the vibrant urban landscape of the 1980s.

programme.title: Storm Cell
programme.desc: A storm chaser battles personal demons while trying to save unsuspecting people from deadly weather. Starring Mimi Rogers, Elyse Levesque, Robert Moloney.

programme.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: When Hannahs customer and Delores theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mothers reputation. Chad and Hannahs romance blossoms. Starring Alison Sweeney, Victor Webster, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: Undercover Grandpa
programme.desc: A shy young man turns to his grandfather and his grandfathers old war buddies to help him rescue the woman of his dreams from kidnappers. Starring James Caan, Dylan Everett, Paul Sorvino.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: After finding out about her fiances cheating ways, a pop superstar impulsively marries a total stranger. As forces conspire to separate the unlikely newlyweds, they must soon decide if two people from such different worlds can find true love. Starring Jennifer Lopez, Owen Wilson, Chloe Coleman.

programme.title: Polar Storm
programme.desc: A scientist must save the day when violent storms threaten Earths magnetic poles. Starring Jack Coleman, Holly Elissa, Tyler Johnston.

programme.title: Fanny: The Right to Rock
programme.desc: The story of a Filipina American garage band that morphed into the ferocious rock group Fanny, which almost became the female version of the Beatles.

programme.title: No Time to Die
programme.desc: Recruited to rescue a kidnapped scientist, globe-trotting spy James Bond finds himself hot on the trail of a mysterious villain whos armed with a dangerous new technology. Starring Daniel Craig, Rami Malek, Lea Seydoux.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: With his future as a doctor on the line, Bash must suppress his instincts and avoid any chance of risk.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank is unaffected by the mosquitoes; Lacey contributes to the time capsule; Oscar goes back to work at Corner Gas.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent brings his arsenal of pitches to a slo-pitch game; Davis and Karen cant ignore an act of vandalism.

programme.title: Law and Order
programme.desc: A judge maintains her husbands innocence after a botched murder attempt leaves her mortally wounded.

programme.title: Hell of a Summer
programme.desc: Camp counselor Jason Hochberg thinks his biggest problem is feeling out of touch with his teenage co-workers. What he doesnt know is that a mysterious masked killer is lurking on the campgrounds, brutally picking off victims one by one. Starring Fred Hechinger, Abby Quinn, Billy Bryk.

programme.title: Cocaine Bear
programme.desc: An oddball group of cops, criminals, tourists and teens converges in a Georgia forest after a 500-pound black bear ingests a large amount of cocaine and goes on a drug-fueled rampage. Starring Keri Russell, Margo Martindale, Ray Liotta.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father. Starring Ana de Armas, Keanu Reeves, Ian McShane.

programme.desc: Shoresy and the team have to protect the North American game.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them. Starring Hank Azaria, Neil Patrick Harris, Jayma Mays.

programme.title: Fubar 2
programme.desc: Head bangers Terry (David Lawrence) and Dean (Paul J. Spence) are tired of barely scraping by and jump on an opportunity to go north and work on the pipelines during the holidays. Starring Dave Lawrence, Paul Spence, Gordon Skilling.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine. Starring Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Adrian Grenier.

programme.title: Legally Blonde

programme.title: Grandmas House
programme.desc: A young woman recounts how her life changed after she moved in with her grandmother.

programme.title: What Would You Do for Love?
programme.desc: A fitness trainer who was living paycheck to paycheck decides to keep his new multimillionaire status a secret when he goes on a dating blitz to find true love in 30 days or less.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Nut Job
programme.desc: Bernie enrolls the children in a myriad of activities, then discovers his Saturdays are at stake.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Other Sister
programme.desc: Bernies sister wants to help raise her niece and nephew but squabbles with her brother over parenting methods.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Revenge, Regret or Redeem?
programme.desc: Sometimes its revenge, regret and redeem all at once.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Alabama State University
programme.desc: Alabama State University.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Bethune-Cookman University
programme.desc: Featuring Bethune-Cookman University.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - HBCU All Star Battle of the Bands
programme.desc: Aspire TVs 6 Minutes to Glory brings six HBCU marching bands to the historic Battle of the Bands at Mercedes Benz Stadium in Atlanta; after months of practice and preparation, these performers are determined to leave their legacy on the field.

programme.title: Playing Sam
programme.desc: After her ex-boyfriends acting career takes off, Samantha picks up the pieces of her broken heart and (so-called) acting career to rediscover her essence as a modern Latinx actress.

programme.title: Really Love
programme.desc: A rising Black painter tries to break into the competitive art world while balancing an unexpected romance with an ambitious law student.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Sweet Hairafter
programme.desc: Michael takes too many hair-growth pills and suffers unusual side effects.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Jr. Executive
programme.desc: As the boss son, Jr. convinces other employees at Kyle Trucking to do his work for him; Claire arranges a secret date with a guy she met on the Internet.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Jay Goes to School
programme.desc: Seeking fulfillment, Jay goes back to college despite Michaels protests; Jr.s buddies (Damon Wayans Jr., Michael Wayans) decide to turn his old baby crib into a hip new machine.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Vanessas parents try to bully Michael and Jay into buying things that will benefit them, not the baby.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Hes Having a Baby
programme.desc: Michael and Jay try to teach Jr. what it is like to be a father by giving him a water balloon to care for.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Funeral
programme.desc: Michaels grief-stricken employee (Sean Whalen) asks Kady to kiss his dead grandmother goodbye at the funeral.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Marathon
programme.desc: Jay and Michael decide to compete in the New York City Marathon, but Michael does not see the need to adopt Jays training regimen.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Manns Payback
programme.desc: The family learns that a criminal Daniel put away years ago is released and they are concerned for his safety; Toni tries to bond with DJ through video gaming.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Mann Bodyguard
programme.desc: Daniel is hired as a bodyguard for a celebrity singer who drives the family crazy; Terri becomes friends with the mean girls at school, but soon learns the value of real friendship.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Manns to Make Her Dance
programme.desc: Tonis mother, Carol, visits and clashes with Lorraine; Daniel works on a case that might prevent him from attending Terris father-daughter dance.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Undercover Mann
programme.desc: Daniel and Michael go under cover to catch an art thief; Michelle visits and is excited to help DJ with a school assignment.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - And Injustice for All
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) faces a judge (guest star Arnetia Walker) when Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn) takes him to court after he sells her a broken TV set.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Educating Piggy
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) have to take a computer course taught by Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Welcome to Bernies
programme.desc: Steve, Cedric, Lovita and Regina (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer, Terri J. Vaughn, Wendy Raquel Robinson) attend a seminar on faculty relationships.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - What You Wont Cue for Love
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) take on Regina and Lovita (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Terri J. Vaughn) in a pool tournament.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Rent
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) falls for an IRS agent (guest star Vanessa Williams) who suspects that Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) is committing tax fraud.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Some Church Bull
programme.desc: In an effort to bring family members closer, Wanda insists they participate in the annual parish retreat.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sorely Missed
programme.desc: When Bernie and Wanda find themselves spending all of their time with the kids, Bernie decides they need some time alone.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Fumes of Detente
programme.desc: Wanda invites Tasha, Vanessas best friend from Chicago, to stay with them; Bernie is worried he will have another difficult teen in his house.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Exercise in Fertility
programme.desc: After several failed attempts, Bernie and Wanda realize that making a baby is harder than they thought, and Wanda begins to question their fertility.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - An Exercise in Fertility
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda focus on having a baby, neglecting the children they already have.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Fantasy Football
programme.desc: Bernie and Jordan join a fantasy football league together, but differing philosophies on player picks soon come between them as Jordan eventually leaves Bernie to get a higher ranking.

programme.desc: A couple are happily awaiting their first child until a secret threatens to destroy their happiness.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: The Foreigner (2017)
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: I See You (2019)
programme.desc: Strange occurrences plague a small-town detective and his family as he investigates the disappearance of a boy.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: The Last Manhunt (2022)
programme.desc: In 1909 Willie Boy and his love, Carlota, go on the run after he accidentally shoots her father in a confrontation gone terribly wrong. With President Taft coming to the area, the local sheriff leads two Native American trackers to hunt them down.

programme.title: Wander (2020)
programme.desc: Hired to investigate a suspicious death in the town of Wander, a paranoid private eye with a troubled past becomes convinced the case is linked to the same conspiracy and cover-up that caused the death of his daughter.

programme.title: Shadow Land (2024)
programme.desc: Haunted by dreams of an assassination plot, a former American president uncovers a conspiracy to discredit his legacy. With help from his trusted adviser, they embark on a dangerous mission that could expose a global crisis.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Shaft (2000)
programme.desc: A detective (Samuel L. Jackson) and a narcotics cop (Vanessa L. Williams) track a sociopath out to kill a woman who can testify that he committed murder.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Top Gun (1986)
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Petes dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: An Air Force drone pilot (Ethan Hawke) begins to question the ethics of dropping bombs on Afghanistan from the safety of his post in Las Vegas.

programme.title: 68 Kill (2017)
programme.desc: A hardworking mans inability to say no to a beautiful women gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th, Part VI: Jason Lives (1986)
programme.desc: Teenage Tommy (Thom Mathews) meets masked-killer Jason, brought back by a lightning bolt at the lake.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier (1989)
programme.sub-title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier (1989)
programme.desc: A renegade Vulcan makes Kirk (William Shatner), Spock (Leonard Nimoy), McCoy (DeForest Kelley) and the Enterprise go to a planet at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis (2002)
programme.desc: The crew (Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner) of the Enterprise must prevent a replica of Capt. Picard (Patrick Stewart) from overtaking Earth.

programme.title: Man With No Past (2025)
programme.desc: Waking up in an unfamiliar city, a man with no memory must confront the mysteries of his own identity. However, his desperate search to uncover the past pits him against a powerful enemy, leading to a showdown that ultimately reveals the truth.

programme.title: Twisted (2004)
programme.desc: With help from her partner (Andy Garcia), a police inspector (Ashley Judd) searches for a killer who is murdering her former lovers.

programme.title: The Lookout (2007)
programme.desc: A brain-damaged former athlete (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) finds himself pulled into a heist at the bank where he works as a janitor.

programme.title: The Score (2001)
programme.desc: A master thief (Robert De Niro) agrees to work with a volatile partner (Edward Norton) for one last heist before he retires.

programme.title: The Saint (1997)
programme.desc: A clever thief who is known as the master of creating false identities using the names of Catholic saints, is hired by the Russian Mafia for his next mission. But things get complicated when he falls for Emma Russel, the scientist.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street (2012)
programme.desc: Two cops (Jonah Hill, Channing Tatum) must confront their teenage angst all over again when they go under cover as high-school students.

programme.title: 22 Jump Street (2014)
programme.desc: Officers Jenko and Schmidt begin to question their partnership after each infiltrates different cliques while undercover at a local college.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part 2 (1981)
programme.desc: Mrs. Voorhees son Jason is waiting when another load of teens (Amy Steel, John Furey, Adrienne King) tries to make a buck at Camp Crystal.

programme.title: Friday the 13th - Part III (1982)
programme.desc: Killer Jason terrorizes teens (Dana Kimmell, Paul Kratka, Tracie Savage) and a biker gang.

programme.title: Kindred (2025)
programme.desc: A pair of twisted, young criminals decide to break into a mansion for one big score, but they soon find out that the owners of the house are much more dangerous than they are.

programme.title: Timeline (2003)
programme.desc: Adventurers (Paul Walker, Frances OConnor, Gerard Butler) travel back to 14th-century France to save a professor caught in the middle of a war.

programme.title: Georgetown (2019)
programme.desc: An eccentric and smooth-talking social climber who seems to have everyone in Washington, D.C., wrapped around his finger is investigated after his wealthy, well-connected and much older wife turns up dead in their home.

programme.title: The Banshees of Inisherin (2022)
programme.desc: On a remote Irish island, Pádraic is devastated when his buddy, Colm, suddenly puts an end to their lifelong friendship. With help from his sister and a troubled islander, Pádraic sets out to repair the damaged relationship by any means necessary.

programme.title: The Godfather, Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone (1990)
programme.sub-title: The Godfather, Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone (1990)
programme.desc: Dignified Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) joins his wild nephew in a Sicilian vendetta involving the Vatican.

programme.title: Hard Home (2024)
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her daughter, a woman turns her high-tech home into a trap for the killer, initiating a deadly game of cat and mouse where every move can be fatal.

programme.title: Harlem Nights (1989)
programme.desc: Business partners (Eddie Murphy, Richard Pryor) sting a white mobster trying to take over their nightclub in 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Spencer (2021)
programme.desc: The marriage between Princess Diana and Prince Charles has grown cold. Though rumors of affairs and a divorce abound, peace is ordained for the Christmas festivities at the queens estate. However, this year, things will be profoundly different.

programme.title: Nocturnal Animals (2016)
programme.desc: A writer (Jake Gyllenhaal) asks his ex-wife (Amy Adams) to read a manuscript of his new novel, a troubling story about a family man whose life takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye (1996)
programme.desc: A slain girls mother (Sally Field) considers vigilantism after police and the courts botch the case against the killer (Kiefer Sutherland).

programme.title: The Silent Planet (2024)
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Funny Face (1957)
programme.desc: A fashion photographer (Fred Astaire) turns a Greenwich Village bookworm (Audrey Hepburn) into a Paris cover girl.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.desc: Benjamin Button (Brad Pitt) is born an old man in 1918 New Orleans and ages in reverse and, in so doing, becomes intimately familiar with the natures of love and death.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road (2008)
programme.desc: In 1950s Connecticut, two suburbanites (Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet) become increasingly dissatisfied with their marriage and societys expectations of conformity.

programme.title: The Queen (2006)
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II and Prime Minister Tony Blair try to reach a compromise in determining the royal familys public reaction to Princess Dianas death.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Assassination Nation (2018)
programme.desc: A small town gets turned upside down when an anonymous hacker reveals personal messages and secrets of thousands of people. As anger erupts into full-blown violence, four teenage girls find themselves in a fight for their lives against an armed mob.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road (2008)
programme.desc: In 1950s Connecticut, two suburbanites (Leonardo DiCaprio, Kate Winslet) become increasingly dissatisfied with their marriage and societys expectations of conformity.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart (2007)
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie) begins a terrifying search for her husband, journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman), after he is kidnapped by terrorists in 2002 Pakistan.

programme.title: Nobodys Fool (2018)
programme.desc: Wild child Tanya looks to her buttoned-up, by-the-book sister Danica to help her get back on her feet. As these polar opposites collide, Tanya soon discovers that Danicas picture-perfect life and boyfriend may not be what they seem.

programme.title: A Single Man (2009)
programme.desc: Planning to commit suicide at the end of the day, a gay professor (Colin Firth) who recently lost his lover goes about his daily routine and visits with longtime friends.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A 50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Beautiful Girls (1996)
programme.desc: The opposite sex preoccupies working-class pals gathered for their high-school reunion in small-town Massachusetts.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance (2001)
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mothers death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest (1981)
programme.desc: Movie queen Joan Crawford (Faye Dunaway) pampers and punishes her adopted son and daughter (Diana Scarwid).

programme.title: Like Water for Chocolate (1992)
programme.desc: The youngest daughter (Lumi Cavazos) of a Mexican family expresses her feelings in preparing wonderful food, when tradition keeps her from marrying her true love (Marco Leonardi).

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A 50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Love, Rosie (2014)
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex are best friends until Alexs family moves to America. They gamble everything to keep their love and friendship alive over the years and miles.

programme.title: No Strings Attached (2011)
programme.desc: After sex enters the equation, two lifelong friends (Natalie Portman, Ashton Kutcher) make a pact to keep their relationship purely physical.

programme.title: The Romantics (2010)
programme.desc: Longtime rivalries resurface in the hours before a woman is scheduled to marry the former lover of her college roommate.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides (1999)
programme.desc: Men reminisce about intriguing sisters, whose parents (James Woods, Kathleen Turner) quarantined them after one of the five killed herself.

programme.title: What If (2013)
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend.

programme.title: The Prince and Me (2004)
programme.desc: Paige, a premedical student, falls in love with Eddie, a Danish prince, who keeps his identity a secret.

programme.title: Grease 2 (1982)
programme.desc: A square British exchange student (Maxwell Caulfield) turns hip motorcyclist to woo a cool girl (Michelle Pfeiffer) in his 1961 high school.

programme.desc: Nestled in the foothills of the Rocky Mountains, Lisa and her friend Tasha embrace cooler temps, campfire living, and cutthroat trout in a backcountry adventure.
